mapper.update: UPDATE connections SET name = #{name}, base_url = #{baseUrl}, api_token = #{apiToken}, status = #{status}, metadata = #{metadata}::jsonb, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM connections WHERE project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM connections WHERE provider_type = #{providerType} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM connections WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM connections WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM connections WHERE id = #{id}
